endpoints.name: Lists all of the available operations.
endpoints.description: Lists all the available operations provided by Service Fabric SeaBreeze resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets all the application resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all application resources in a given subscription. The information includes the information about the application's services and other runtime properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the network resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all network resources in a given subscription. The information includes the network description and other runtime properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the volume resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all volume resources in a given subscription. The information includes the volume description and other runtime information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the application resources in a given resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all application resources in a given resource group. The information includes the information about the application's services and other runtime properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the application resource.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the application resource with a given name. The information includes the information about the application's services and other runtime properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates an application resource.
endpoints.description:
Creates an application resource with the specified name and description. If an application with the same name already exists, then its description is updated to the one indicated in this request.

Use network resources to provide public connectivity to the services of an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the application resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the application resource identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets services of a given application.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all services of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the properties of the service.
endpoints.description: The operation returns the properties of the service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets replicas of a given service.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all replicas of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets a specific replica of a given service.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the specified replica of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the logs for the container.
endpoints.description: Get the logs for the container of a given code package of an application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONNAME}} with a real applicationname. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CODEPACKAGENAME}} with a real codepackagename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets all the network resources in a given resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all network resources in a given resource group. The information includes the network description and other runtime properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the network resource.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the network resource with a given name. This information includes the network description and other runtime information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKNAME}} with a real networkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a network resource.
endpoints.description:
Creates a network resource with the specified name and description. If a network with the same name already exists, then its description is updated to the one indicated in this request.

Use network resources to create private network and configure public connectivity for services within your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKNAME}} with a real networkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the network resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the network resource identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKNAME}} with a real networkname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets all the volume resources in a given resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all volume resources in a given resource group. The information includes the volume description and other runtime information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the volume resource.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the volume resource with a given name. This information includes the volume description and other runtime information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a volume resource.
endpoints.description: Creates a volume resource with the specified name and description. If a volume with the same name already exists, then its description is updated to the one indicated in this request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.

endpoints.name: Deletes the volume resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the volume identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VOLUMENAME}} with a real volumename.
